event.name: NBA Trade Deadline 2023 — Kevin Durant to Phoenix Suns

context.pre_match_notes: KD traded to Phoenix, first game in Suns uniform. New player integration — first game chemistry unknown. SportMind signal: superstar addition creates short-term volatility (positive narrative) but first-game integration risk. Suns previously 27-26, now with KD suddenly 'championship contender' narrative.

question: Does a superstar trade acquisition immediately translate to match wins, or does integration risk apply?

verified_outcome.key_variable: superstar_arrival_narrative + individual_quality_floor — KD's individual output overcame integration risk
